stemHtml: A well-developed inversion exists in a valley. Which of the following describes a flight hazard and may influence the performance of an aircraft departing from an airfield on the floor of the valley?

options.a: Air flow in a vertical direction along the upwind side of the valley.
options.b: Orographic uplift in the afternoon forming cumuliform clouds above the inversion with associated vertical wind shear.
options.c: Strong winds above the inversion layer of up to 30 knots to 50 knots.
options.d: Anabatic winds blowing downhill due to the temperature inversion.
